summary: Performed bridge-free 10-average autosave review for running det=1.0 MHz Ramsey job nv23_ramsey_20260514_230820_auto_ramsey. The job remained running at 10/16 averages with healthy counts, no monitor error, no stop request, and no drift flags. Target FFT bins remain weak/provisional (direct 13C 0.20%, det-13C 0.64%, carrier 0.36%, det+13C 0.82%, previous 1.9 MHz 0.46%), so no T2star or 13C claim was made. Updated evidence, lab log, backlog, and work/state.md; next step is to wait for terminal 16-average data or hard anomaly evidence before any bridge-touching work.

next_action.reason: Bridge job is still running; bridge-touching work remains blocked. Terminal review should raw-export, plot/readout-review, drift-check, assess signal presence before fitting T2*, and compare det=1.0 MHz FFT targets against 13C and prior 1.9 MHz ambiguity.
